title: TaggingConfigSchema
description: Schema for the tagging configuration that maps papers to AS/A2 levels.

subject_name.description: The name of the subject for easier identification.

FULL.description: List of paper numbers that test both AS and A2 syllabus content.

mcq_papers.description: List of paper numbers that are multiple choice (e.g. [1]).

mcq_bulk_size.description: How many questions to send to Gemini at once for MCQ papers.

mcq_max_topics.description: Maximum number of topics to allow per MCQ question.
